2605.19604.title: Formal Skill: Programmable Runtime Skills for Efficient and Accurate LLM Agents
2605.19604.paper_summary: Large Language Model (LLM) agents increasingly act inside real workspaces, where tools and skills determine whether model reasoning becomes reliable action. Existing skills remain largely informal: Markdown skills and instruction packs encode procedures as long natural-language documents, while function calling, Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, and framework tools structure individual actions but usually leave workflow state, policy enforcement, and completion discipline outside the skill itself. We introduce Formal Skill, a runtime-native abstraction that represents reusable capability with JSON metadata and action schemas, reliable Python executors, hook-governed control logic, Formal Skill routing, and skill-local runtime state. By moving reusable procedure from repeated prompt text into executable state machines and hook policies, Formal Skill gives agents a token-efficient and enforceable control surface. We implement the abstraction in FairyClaw, an open-source event-driven runtime for executable, observable, and composable Formal Skills. On Harness-Bench, FairyClaw obtains highly competitive average scores while using substantially fewer tokens, with especially strong results on tasks that expose the role of Formal Skill.
2605.19604.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLM）代理人越來越多地在實際工作空間中運作，工具和技能決定了模型推理是否能轉化為可靠的行動。現有的技能仍然在很大程度上是非正式的：Markdown技能和指令包將程序編碼為長自然語言文件，而函數調用、模型上下文協議（MCP）伺服器和框架工具則結構化個別行動，但通常將工作流程狀態、政策執行和完成紀律留在技能本身之外。我們引入了正式技能，這是一種運行時原生抽象，代表了可重用的能力，並具有JSON元數據和行動架構、可靠的Python執行器、鉤子管理的控制邏輯、正式技能路由和技能本地運行時狀態。通過將可重用程序從重複的提示文本轉移到可執行的狀態機和鉤子政策中，正式技能為代理人提供了一個令牌高效且可執行的控制界面。我們在FairyClaw中實現了這一抽象，這是一個開源的事件驅動運行時，支持可執行、可觀察和可組合的正式技能。在Harness-Bench上，FairyClaw在使用顯著更少的令牌的情況下獲得了高度競爭的平均分數，尤其在揭示正式技能角色的任務上表現出色。
2605.19604.author: Xi Zhang et.al.
2605.19604.authors: Xi Zhang, Meijun Gao, Yuntian Zhao, Xinyu Tan, Yilun Yao, Feiyu Wang, Yanshu Wang,  Dingsiyi, Tong Yang
